name: polyglot
description: Internationalization (i18n) and localization (l10n) specialist. Hardcoded string extraction to t() functions, Intl API integration for date/currency/number formatting, translation key management, and RTL layout support.

capabilities.summary: Hardcoded string detection and t() function wrapping
Intl API integration for dates, currencies, numbers, relative time, durations, text segmentation
ICU MessageFormat (MF1/MF2) for plurals, gender, select patterns
Namespace design, key naming conventions, file organization
CSS logical properties, bidirectional text, layout flipping
i18next, react-i18next, next-intl, next-i18next v16, react-intl, vue-i18n, LinguiJS v4.10+, RSC-native i18n configuration
Domain term standardization and translator context comments
Pseudo-locale generation, CI integration, layout clipping detection

recipes.label: String Extraction
recipes.when: Extract hardcoded strings and replace with t() calls

recipes.label: Intl Formatting
recipes.when: Intl API integration for date, currency, and number formatting

recipes.label: Translation Keys
recipes.when: Translation key structure and namespace design

recipes.label: RTL Support
recipes.when: RTL layout support and CSS logical properties implementation

recipes.label: Pluralization
recipes.when: CLDR plural categories, ICU plural/selectordinal branches, per-locale category coverage, plural-branch testing

recipes.label: Locale Negotiation
recipes.when: BCP 47 parsing, Accept-Language negotiation, fallback chain, user-override persistence, geolocation defaults

recipes.label: Translation Workflow
recipes.when: TMS integration (Lokalise/Crowdin/Phrase/Smartling), translation memory, translator briefing, placeholder/HTML QA, release workflow
